title: AK vs AK
tmdbOverview: After a public spat with a movie star,  a disgraced director retaliates by kidnapping the actor's daughter, filming the search for her in real-time.
synopsis: AK vs AK is a 2020 comedy, action and drama film from India. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
